allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Complete MacroPlan initial setup with all dependencies

- Install all core dependencies (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5)
- Add Supabase client libraries (@supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/ssr)
- Configure Stripe payment integration
- Set up form handling with react-hook-form and Zod validation
- Install UI utilities (lucide-react, date-fns, zustand, CVA, clsx, tailwind-merge)
- Configure Tailwind CSS v4 with MacroPlan brand colors
- Create Supabase client utilities for browser and server-side
- Set up environment variable templates
- Add API test endpoint for configuration verification
- Configure code formatting with Prettier and ESLint
- Set up shadcn/ui component system

Security:
- All environment variables properly configured in .env.local (gitignored)
- Semgrep security scan: 0 vulnerabilities found
- Supabase SSR implementation follows official patterns
- No hardcoded secrets or security issues detected

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement Phase 1 of onboarding flow (Foundation)

This commit implements the complete Phase 1 foundation for the MacroPlan
onboarding flow as specified in ONBOARDING_FLOW_SPECIFICATION.md.

## Changes

### Dependencies
- Installed shadcn/ui components: button, input, label, card, radio-group,
  select, checkbox, dialog, form, skeleton

### State Management
- Created Zustand onboarding store with localStorage persistence
- Implemented complete state interface for all 6 onboarding steps
- Added calculation functions for BMR, TDEE, and macro distribution
- Implemented actions: setGoal, setPersonalStats, setActivityLevel,
  calculateMacros, markStepComplete, resetOnboarding

### Shared Components
- ProgressIndicator: 6-dot progress tracker with active/completed states
- StepContainer: Reusable step wrapper with back button, title, subtitle,
  and continue CTA

### Onboarding Routes (app/(auth)/onboarding/)
- Step 1: Goal Selection (Cut/Bulk/Maintain/Recomp)
- Step 2: Personal Stats (Age, Weight, Height, Sex) with form validation
- Step 3: Activity Level (5 levels from Sedentary to Extremely Active)
- Step 4-5: Placeholder pages for future implementation
- Step 6: Macro Results with calculated TDEE and macro breakdown

### Calculation Utilities (lib/calculations/)
- bmr.ts: Mifflin-St Jeor BMR calculation
- tdee.ts: TDEE with activity multipliers
- macros.ts: Macro distribution based on goals

### Additional
- Created placeholder dashboard page
- Added basic middleware for route protection
- Created comprehensive technical specification document

## Technical Details

### Form Validation
- React Hook Form + Zod for type-safe validation
- Age: 13-120 years
- Weight: 50-500 lbs/kg with unit conversion
- Height: Imperial (feet + inches) with validation
- Sex: Toggle buttons (Male/Female)

### Calculations
- BMR: Mifflin-St Jeor equation (more accurate than Harris-Benedict)
- TDEE: BMR × activity multiplier (1.2 - 1.9)
- Macros: Goal-based distribution
  * Cut: 20% calorie deficit, 1g protein/lb
  * Bulk: 10% calorie surplus, 0.8g protein/lb
  * Maintain/Recomp: Maintenance calories

### Mobile-First Design
- Responsive layout with Tailwind CSS
- Touch-friendly tap targets
- Sticky bottom CTA buttons
- Progress indicator at top

## Build Status

✅ Build completed successfully
✅ All 6 onboarding routes generated
✅ TypeScript compilation passed
✅ No runtime errors

## Routes Generated
- /onboarding → redirects to /onboarding/1
- /onboarding/1 → Goal Selection
- /onboarding/2 → Personal Stats
- /onboarding/3 → Activity Level
- /onboarding/4 → Placeholder
- /onboarding/5 → Placeholder
- /onboarding/6 → Macro Results
- /dashboard → Placeholder

## Next Steps (Phase 2)
- Implement steps 4-5 (dietary preferences, experience level)
- Add authentication modal
- Integrate Supabase for data persistence
- Add animations and loading states
- Implement comprehensive testing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
